title: delphinium fissum subsp. pallasii
intro: Delphinium fissum subsp. pallasii, also known as Pallas's delphinium or Pallas's larkspur, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the delphinium genus and is native to Eastern Europe and Western Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, which are derived from its alkaloids, including delphinine and methyllycaconitine. The health benefits of Delphinium fissum subsp. pallasii include its ability to relieve respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate pain. Delphinium fissum subsp. pallasii can be prepared as a tincture, infusion, or tea, and its powdered roots can be used in traditional herbal medicine to treat various ailments.
